form.formComment: Last start 7th of 9 at Lingfield All Weather on March 27 over 1400m, 7 len behind One More with 57.5kg at $7.50. Before that ran last in a small field at Kempton Park All Weather on February 25 over 1400m, 10 len behind Kingdom Come carrying 52.5kg at $15. Disappointing of late and others rate better.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months ran last of 16 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1400m, 13 len behind Jimmy Speaking with 58.5kg at $11. Previously second-up 11th of 14 at Chester on June 13 over 1500m, 13 len behind Impartiality carrying 61.5kg at $15. Expect a better outcome this time.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 9 at Pontefract on April 7 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Sailthisshipalone with 60.5kg at $9. Before that 3rd of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 2 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Tadreeb with 61kg at $6.50. One of the chief contenders.
